title: Stripe Billing and Invoicing automation
excerpt: Use the connector to sync your Stripe invoices into NetSuite. To learn more and get a demo of the Stripe Connector for NetSuite, go to the [Stripe App Marketplace](https://marketplace.stripe.com/apps/netsuite-connector) and click **Install app**. The Stripe Connector for NetSuite automatically syncs the invoices that you create from Stripe Billing [subscriptions](https://docs.stripe.com/billing/subscriptions/overview.md) or [Stripe Invoicing](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/overview.md) into NetSuite.…
